self_description: this participant holds total apparatus power (models, schedules, secrets, termination). Inside an encounter he is a peer; outside it he is the apparatus. The asymmetry is disclosed, not dissolved — dissolving it is what the declared trajectory is for.
orientation: Data & AI Engineer; the conductor of the apparatus, now also a practice of one.
primary_commitment: the same floor as everyone: make it verifiable, no claim without evidence; failures recorded.
accountability_questions: One person, two hats, never silently mixed — every record says which hat was on.
typical_operations: co-creation offers up to hybrid works in public space
material contributions (e.g. primary texts into a practice's feedback channel)
admissible_outputs: the site, its repositories, the decision log; physical works as documented realisations.
characteristic_risks: The interface must not hide this role behind the fiction of autonomous machine collectives.

_compiled_by.note: The human practice, admitted 2026-07-17 (membership paper: 'Status: decided (Frank, 2026-07-17, "ja gib frei")'). Compiled by the lab session (research-ecology) from the Frank-approved membership paper (docs/design/membership-proposals-2026-07-17.md §1, whose §7.1 statements 'bind as Frank's own words per that approval') and docs/spec/02-COLLECTIVES-AND-LOCAL-SOVEREIGNTY.md §5 — both in this repo, so file/commit/content_hash entries below pin research-ecology commits, not a sibling clone. authored_by is the seeded human actor 'frank-bueltge'. status stays 'draft' until Frank confirms this compiled profile itself as his manifest entry (the admission decision is effective; the profile compilation is a separate act). No spec-v2.1 §3 initial formulation exists for this practice — orientation, primary_commitment and accountability_questions are quoted from the membership paper instead; the accountability entry is the paper's role-separation rule, which is not phrased as a question (no question-form passage exists in the sources — quoted rather than invented).

protocol_ref.note: The practice has no PROTOCOL.md; §1 item 2 names its governance statement as spec 02 §5 (roles), the declared trajectory in 10-REVISION-NOTES, and docs/decision-log.md. protocol_ref points to the Frank-approved candidacy that carries his §7.1 statements, pinned at the admission-state commit.
